items.name: unsolved_crimes
items.description: Filters to crime incidents that have not yet been resolved, useful for tracking outstanding cases and active investigation workloads.

items.name: property_crimes
items.description: Filters to property-category crimes such as break-and-enter, auto theft, and theft from vehicles, excluding violent or other crime categories.

items.name: violent_crimes
items.description: Filters to violent-category crimes, useful for safety and community well-being analyses distinct from property or other offence types.

items.name: residential_permits
items.description: Filters to residential building permits only, enabling housing supply analysis separate from commercial or industrial construction activity.

items.name: completed_permits
items.description: Filters to permits that have reached completed status (all inspections passed), reflecting construction work that has been fully signed off.

items.name: new_dwelling_permits
items.description: Filters to permits that resulted in the creation of at least one new dwelling unit, isolating net housing supply additions from renovation or demolition activity.

items.name: open_service_requests
items.description: Filters to service requests that have not yet been closed, representing active workload for municipal service departments.

items.name: recent_service_requests
items.description: Filters to service requests submitted from 2024 onwards, focusing analysis on current operational demand and recent service delivery trends.

items.name: one_bedroom_units
items.description: Filters rental market data to 1-bedroom units, the most common unit type, for targeted vacancy rate and average rent analysis.

items.name: recent_rental_data
items.description: Filters to CMHC rental market surveys from 2020 onwards, capturing post-pandemic rental conditions and recent affordability trends.

items.name: high_vacancy_rate
items.description: Filters to rental market records where the vacancy rate exceeds 3%, a threshold commonly used to indicate a tenant-friendly or softening rental market.

items.name: wheelchair_accessible_stops
items.description: Filters to transit stops confirmed as wheelchair accessible (boarding code = 1), enabling accessibility coverage analysis across transit networks.

items.name: recent_house_price_index
items.description: Filters the Teranet House Price Index to records from January 2020 onwards, focusing on recent price trends including pandemic-era and post-pandemic market movements.

items.name: price_increasing_months
items.description: Filters to months where the house price index recorded a positive month-over-month change, useful for identifying sustained price appreciation periods.

items.name: directive_decisions
items.description: Filters to strong mayor decisions of type 'directive', where a mayor has issued a direct instruction to municipal staff or departments under Ontario's strong mayor powers.

items.name: veto_notices
items.description: Filters to strong mayor veto notices, where a mayor has formally signalled intent to veto a council decision under Ontario's strong mayor legislation.

items.name: toronto_bylaw_approvals
items.description: Filters Toronto mayoral decisions to bylaw approvals, isolating decisions where the Mayor formally approved new or amended city bylaws.

items.name: toronto_appointment_decisions
items.description: Filters Toronto mayoral decisions to appointments, covering decisions where the Mayor appointed individuals to committees, boards, or city roles.

items.name: recent_toronto_decisions
items.description: Filters to Toronto mayoral decisions issued from 2024 onwards, focusing on current-term governance activity.

items.name: designated_municipalities
items.description: Filters to Ontario municipalities that hold active strong mayor designation status, excluding any that have had their designation removed or are under review.

items.name: 2025_expansion_municipalities
items.description: Filters to municipalities added to the strong mayor framework in the 2025 provincial expansion wave, useful for comparing newly designated cities against the original cohort.

items.name: ingested_municipalities
items.description: Filters to municipalities whose decision data has been successfully ingested into the platform, ensuring analyses only run over municipalities with available records.

items.name: total_permits
items.description: Total number of building and construction permits issued across all cities.

items.name: total_new_dwelling_units
items.description: Total net new residential dwelling units created across all permits — a core measure of housing supply growth.

items.name: avg_construction_cost_per_permit
items.description: Average estimated construction cost per permit in dollars, indicating the scale and type of development activity.

items.name: avg_house_price_index
items.description: Average Teranet house price index value across all tracked cities and months — a broad indicator of housing market price levels.

items.name: peak_house_price_index
items.description: Peak Teranet house price index value recorded across all cities, marking the highest point of housing price appreciation.

items.name: avg_monthly_house_price_change
items.description: Average month-over-month percentage change in the Teranet house price index, reflecting the pace of housing price appreciation or decline.

items.name: avg_rent
items.description: Average monthly rent in dollars across all CMHC rental market survey records, cities, zones, and bedroom types.

items.name: avg_vacancy_rate
items.description: Average rental vacancy rate (%) across all cities, zones, and bedroom types — a key indicator of rental market tightness.

items.name: peak_avg_rent
items.description: Highest average monthly rent recorded across all rental market survey records — represents the ceiling of rental affordability pressure.

items.name: total_rental_units
items.description: Total rental units counted across all CMHC survey records, reflecting the scale of the purpose-built rental stock.

items.name: total_population
items.description: Total 2021 census population summed across all geographic areas — the foundational denominator for per-capita urban metrics.

items.name: total_households
items.description: Total number of occupied private households across all census areas — used to size housing demand and affordability calculations.

items.name: avg_median_individual_income
items.description: Average of the median total individual income (dollars) across census areas — the standard measure of income levels for affordability benchmarking.

items.name: total_crime_incidents
items.description: Total number of crime incidents reported across all cities — a top-level public safety indicator.

items.name: crime_type_diversity
items.description: Number of distinct crime types observed — a measure of the breadth of criminal activity, useful for resource allocation planning.

items.name: total_service_requests
items.description: Total number of municipal service requests submitted by residents across all cities — an indicator of service demand and civic engagement.

items.name: service_request_type_diversity
items.description: Number of distinct service request types submitted — reflects the breadth of municipal service delivery across cities.

items.name: total_transit_stops
items.description: Total number of transit stops across all cities and agencies — a measure of transit network coverage and accessibility.

items.name: transit_agency_count
items.description: Number of distinct transit agencies represented in the stop network — indicates the breadth of transit operators serving the region.

items.name: strong_mayor_decisions
items.description: Total number of formal decisions issued by Ontario strong mayors — tracks the use of strong mayor powers across municipalities.

items.name: strong_mayor_municipalities_with_decisions
items.description: Number of distinct municipalities that have issued strong mayor decisions — shows how broadly the strong mayor framework is being exercised.

items.name: strong_mayor_municipalities_total
items.description: Total number of Ontario municipalities designated under the strong mayor powers framework.

items.name: toronto_mayoral_decisions
items.description: Total number of mayoral decisions issued by the Mayor of Toronto.

items.name: avg_toronto_mayoral_decision_length
items.description: Average character length of Toronto mayoral decision PDF documents — a proxy for decision complexity and detail.

items.name: total_private_dwellings
items.description: Total number of private dwellings across all census areas — the complete housing stock count used for vacancy and density analysis.

items.name: avg_dwelling_units_per_permit
items.description: Average number of net new residential dwelling units created per permit — indicates housing density of development activity (higher values signal multi-unit / high-density projects).

items.name: avg_transit_stops_per_agency
items.description: Average number of transit stops per agency — reflects the size and reach of individual transit operators in the network.

items.name: strong_mayor_decision_ingestion_rate
items.description: Percentage of discovered strong mayor decisions that have been successfully ingested into the database — measures data pipeline completeness across all municipalities.

items.name: census_city
items.description: The name of the Canadian city or municipality covered by this census profile (e.g. Toronto, Vancouver, Calgary). Use to filter or group demographic data by city.

items.name: census_province
items.description: The Canadian province the census geography belongs to (e.g. Ontario, British Columbia, Alberta). Use to roll up or filter demographic data at the provincial level.

items.name: crime_category
items.description: Broad category of the crime incident (e.g. property, violent). Use to group and compare crime volume across high-level crime classes.

items.name: crime_type
items.description: Specific type of crime committed (e.g. auto_theft, break_and_enter). Use to drill into particular crime types within a broader category.

items.name: crime_location_type
items.description: The type of location where the crime incident occurred (e.g. street, parking lot, commercial premises). Use to identify where crimes most frequently take place.

items.name: crime_occurrence_year
items.description: The calendar year in which the crime incident occurred. Use to analyse year-over-year crime trends.

items.name: crime_occurrence_month
items.description: The calendar month (1–12) in which the crime incident occurred. Use to detect seasonal crime patterns within a year.

items.name: crime_city
items.description: The Canadian city where the crime incident was reported (e.g. toronto, mississauga, vancouver). Use to compare crime volumes and types across cities.

items.name: hpi_city
items.description: The Canadian city for which the house price index value is reported (e.g. Calgary, Toronto, Vancouver). Use to compare housing price trends across cities.

items.name: hpi_year
items.description: The calendar year of the house price index observation. Use to analyse long-term housing price trends year over year.

items.name: hpi_month
items.description: The calendar month (1–12) of the house price index observation. Use to identify seasonal patterns in housing prices within a year.

items.name: hpi_quarter
items.description: The fiscal quarter (1–4) of the house price index observation. Use to group housing price data into quarterly periods for trend analysis.

items.name: permit_type
items.description: The broad category of building or construction permit issued (e.g. RESIDENTIAL, COMMERCIAL, INDUSTRIAL). Use to filter and compare permit activity by development type.

items.name: permit_status
items.description: The current status of the building permit (e.g. COMPLETED, IN PROGRESS). Use to filter permits by their stage in the approval and construction lifecycle.

items.name: permit_work_type
items.description: The type of construction or renovation work covered by the permit (e.g. ALTERATION, NEW CONSTRUCTION, DEMOLITION). Use to analyse permit activity by work category.

items.name: permit_application_year
items.description: The calendar year in which the building permit application was submitted. Use to track year-over-year permit application volumes and construction activity.

items.name: permit_city
items.description: The Canadian city where the building permit was issued (e.g. toronto, mississauga, vancouver). Use to compare construction and development activity across cities.

items.name: strong_mayor_decision_type
items.description: The type of formal decision issued by a mayor under Ontario's strong mayor powers (e.g. appointment, written_approval, decision). Use to filter and compare decisions by their legal or procedural category.

items.name: strong_mayor_municipality
items.description: The name of the Ontario municipality whose mayor issued this decision (e.g. Milton, Ottawa, Brampton). Use to filter or compare mayoral decisions across municipalities.

items.name: strong_mayor_decision_year
items.description: The year in which the strong mayor decision was issued. Use to track decision-making activity year over year across Ontario municipalities.

items.name: strong_mayor_scrape_status
items.description: The status of the data collection process for this decision document (e.g. ok, error). Use to filter out records with incomplete or failed data collection.

items.name: municipality_designation_wave
items.description: The wave or phase in which the municipality was designated under Ontario's strong mayor framework (e.g. pre_2025, 2025_expansion). Use to group municipalities by when they received strong mayor powers.

items.name: municipality_designation_status
items.description: Whether the municipality is currently designated under Ontario's strong mayor legislation (e.g. designated). Use to filter to active vs. inactive designations.

items.name: municipality_implementation_status
items.description: The data ingestion and implementation status for the municipality's decision records (e.g. ingested, source_found, unassessed). Use to monitor data coverage across municipalities.

items.name: municipality_registry_status
items.description: The registry readiness status of the municipality's decision source (e.g. ready, unassessed). Use to identify municipalities whose data sources are fully configured.

items.name: transit_agency
items.description: The transit agency operating the stop (e.g. TransLink, TTC, OC Transpo). Use to filter or compare transit stop data by agency.

items.name: transit_city
items.description: The Canadian city where the transit stop is located (e.g. vancouver, toronto, ottawa). Use to compare transit network coverage and stop counts across cities.

items.name: transit_wheelchair_boarding
items.description: Indicates whether the transit stop supports wheelchair boarding (0 = no information, 1 = accessible, 2 = not accessible). Use to analyse transit accessibility across stops and cities.

items.name: rental_city
items.description: The Canadian city for which the CMHC rental market data is reported (e.g. toronto, vancouver, calgary). Use to compare rental market conditions across cities.

items.name: rental_bedroom_type
items.description: The bedroom configuration of the rental unit (e.g. Bachelor, 1 Bedroom, 2 Bedroom, 3 Bedroom+, Total). Use to compare vacancy rates and average rents by unit size.

items.name: rental_year
items.description: The calendar year of the CMHC rental market survey (ranging from 1990 to 2025). Use to track long-term trends in rents and vacancy rates over time.

items.name: service_request_type
items.description: The type of municipal service request submitted by residents (e.g. Snow Removal, Water Main Leak, Missed Garbage Collection). Use to analyse the volume and mix of service issues reported.

items.name: service_request_department
items.description: The municipal department responsible for handling the service request (e.g. Street Maintenance, Water, Garbage & Recycling). Use to measure workload and performance by department.

items.name: service_request_status
items.description: The current status of the service request (e.g. Open, Closed, In Progress). Use to monitor outstanding vs. resolved requests and track resolution rates.

items.name: service_request_channel
items.description: The channel through which the service request was submitted (e.g. phone, online, mobile app). Use to understand how residents prefer to interact with municipal services.

items.name: service_request_year
items.description: The calendar year in which the municipal service request was submitted. Use to track year-over-year trends in service demand.

items.name: service_request_month
items.description: The calendar month (1–12) in which the service request was submitted. Use to identify seasonal peaks in municipal service demand.

items.name: service_request_city
items.description: The Canadian city from which the service request was submitted (e.g. winnipeg, toronto, vancouver). Use to compare service request volumes and types across cities.

items.name: toronto_decision_type
items.description: The type of mayoral decision issued by the Mayor of Toronto (e.g. committee_structure, bylaw_approval, appointment). Use to filter and compare Toronto mayoral decisions by their procedural category.

items.name: toronto_decision_year
items.description: The year in which the Toronto mayoral decision was issued (ranging from 2022 to 2026). Use to track the volume and types of mayoral decisions over time.

items.name: permit_count
items.description: Total number of building and construction permits issued.

items.name: permit_avg_est_const_cost
items.description: Average estimated construction cost per permit, in dollars.

items.name: permit_total_dwelling_units_created
items.description: Total net new residential dwelling units created across all permits.

items.name: rental_market_count
items.description: Total number of CMHC rental market survey records.

items.name: rental_avg_vacancy_rate
items.description: Average rental vacancy rate (%) across cities, zones, and bedroom types.

items.name: rental_avg_rent
items.description: Average monthly rent (dollars) across rental market survey records.

items.name: rental_max_avg_rent
items.description: Highest average monthly rent recorded across all rental market survey records.

items.name: house_price_index_count
items.description: Total number of Teranet house price index monthly records.

items.name: house_price_avg_index_value
items.description: Average Teranet house price index value across all cities and months.

items.name: house_price_max_index_value
items.description: Peak Teranet house price index value recorded across all cities.

items.name: house_price_avg_mom_change
items.description: Average month-over-month percentage change in the house price index.

items.name: crime_incident_count
items.description: Total number of crime incidents reported across all cities.

items.name: crime_distinct_type_count
items.description: Number of distinct crime types observed across all incidents.

items.name: service_request_count
items.description: Total number of municipal service requests submitted by residents.

items.name: service_request_distinct_type_count
items.description: Number of distinct service request types submitted across all cities.

items.name: census_profile_count
items.description: Total number of census profile records (geographic areas covered).

items.name: census_total_population
items.description: Total 2021 census population summed across all geographic areas.

items.name: census_avg_median_total_income
items.description: Average of the median total individual income (dollars) across census areas.

items.name: census_avg_total_income
items.description: Average of the average total individual income (dollars) across census areas.

items.name: census_total_private_dwellings
items.description: Total number of private dwellings summed across all census areas.

items.name: census_total_households
items.description: Total number of occupied private households summed across all census areas.

items.name: transit_stop_count
items.description: Total number of transit stops across all cities and agencies.

items.name: transit_stop_distinct_agency_count
items.description: Number of distinct transit agencies represented in the stop network.

items.name: strong_mayor_decision_count
items.description: Total number of formal decisions issued by Ontario strong mayors.

items.name: strong_mayor_decision_distinct_municipality_count
items.description: Number of distinct municipalities that have issued strong mayor decisions.

items.name: toronto_mayoral_decision_count
items.description: Total number of mayoral decisions issued by the Mayor of Toronto.

items.name: toronto_mayoral_avg_text_char_count
items.description: Average character length of Toronto mayoral decision PDF documents, indicating decision complexity.

items.name: strong_mayor_municipality_count
items.description: Total number of Ontario municipalities designated under the strong mayor powers framework.

items.name: strong_mayor_municipality_total_discovered
items.description: Total number of strong mayor decisions discovered (scraped) across all municipalities.

items.name: strong_mayor_municipality_total_ingested
items.description: Total number of strong mayor decisions successfully ingested into the database across all municipalities.

items.name: rental_total_units
items.description: Total rental units counted across all CMHC survey records (cities, zones, and bedroom types).

items.name: strong_mayor_decision_to_municipality
items.description: Each strong mayor decision is issued by exactly one Ontario municipality. This links every formal mayoral decision back to its issuing municipality's reference record, enabling analysis of decision volume, type, and frequency by municipality.

items.name: crime_incident_to_census_profile
items.description: Links each crime incident to the census demographic profile of the city where it occurred. Enables cross-referencing of crime rates, types, and trends against population density, income levels, and age distribution for that city.

items.name: permit_to_census_profile
items.description: Links each building or construction permit to the census demographic profile of the city where it was issued. Supports analysis of development activity relative to population growth, dwelling unit counts, and household characteristics.

items.name: transit_stop_to_census_profile
items.description: Links each transit stop to the census demographic profile of its city. Enables analysis of transit network density and accessibility relative to population size, density, and socioeconomic characteristics of the city.

items.name: service_request_to_census_profile
items.description: Links each municipal service request to the census demographic profile of the city where it was submitted. Supports analysis of service demand volumes, request types, and resolution times relative to the city's population size and household composition.

items.name: rental_market_to_house_price_index
items.description: Links rental market records to house price index records for the same city. Both tables track housing conditions over time by city, enabling side-by-side analysis of rental vacancy rates and average rents against home ownership price trends to understand the full housing market picture.

items.name: toronto_mayoral_decision_to_census_profile
items.description: Links each Toronto mayoral decision to Toronto's census demographic profile. Provides demographic and socioeconomic context for governance decisions made by the Mayor of Toronto, supporting analysis of how policy decisions relate to the city's population characteristics.

items.name: strong_mayor_decision_to_census_profile
items.description: Links strong mayor decisions to the census demographic profile of the city where the decision was issued. Contextualises formal mayoral decisions with the demographic and socioeconomic characteristics of the municipality, enabling governance-population analysis.

items.name: rental_market_to_census_profile
items.description: Links rental market data to the census demographic profile of each city. Enables analysis of rental vacancy rates, average rents, and bedroom type demand in the context of a city's population size, household composition, income levels, and age distribution.

items.name: house_price_index_to_census_profile
items.description: Links monthly Teranet house price index values to the census demographic profile of each city. Supports analysis of home price trends relative to population growth, dwelling unit supply, median income, and household size across Canadian cities.

items.name: CensusProfile
items.description: Demographic and socioeconomic snapshot for Canadian cities from the 2021 Census, including population, age distribution, household size, income, and dwelling statistics.

items.name: CrimeIncident
items.description: Individual crime incidents reported across Canadian cities, including crime type, category, offence, neighbourhood, location coordinates, and occurrence date.

items.name: HousePriceIndex
items.description: Monthly Teranet house price index values for Canadian cities, tracking home price trends including seasonally adjusted values, month-over-month changes, and price level indicators.

items.name: Permit
items.description: Building and construction permits issued across Canadian cities, covering permit type, structure type, work type, address, estimated construction cost, dwelling units, and key milestone dates.

items.name: RentalMarket
items.description: CMHC rental market data by city, zone, and bedroom type, capturing average and median rents, vacancy rates, rent changes, and total rental unit counts on an annual basis.

items.name: ServiceRequest
items.description: Municipal service requests submitted by residents across Canadian cities, including request type, department, neighbourhood, submission channel, status, and open/close dates.

items.name: StrongMayorDecision
items.description: Formal decisions issued by mayors under Ontario's strong mayor powers across 92 municipalities, including decision type, title, summary, and associated PDF documents.

items.name: StrongMayorMunicipality
items.description: Reference registry of Ontario municipalities designated under the strong mayor framework, including designation wave, effective date, implementation status, and data ingestion progress tracking.

items.name: TorontoMayoralDecision
items.description: Mayoral decisions issued by the Mayor of Toronto, including decision type, title, summary, PDF source documents, and publication dates — covering committee structures, appointments, bylaw approvals, and more.

items.name: TransitStop
items.description: Transit stops across Canadian cities and agencies (e.g. STM, TTC), including stop name, code, geographic coordinates, accessibility (wheelchair boarding), location type, and parent station groupings.
